notes: Anonymous INSUL-layer 5-vertex LWPOLYLINE cluster; insulation fill, not walls.

rationale.evidence: All 24 entities are LWPOLYLINE on X-평면도(기본형)$0$INSUL with identical 5-vertex samples. No LINE/ARC/INSERT/DIMENSION content appears. The INSUL layer name and uniform polyline pattern indicate insulation hatch geometry rather than wall outlines.
rationale.rule: Treat homogeneous anonymous *U* blocks whose only layer token is INSUL and whose entities are short closed/open polylines as insulation fills (기타), not wall partial plans. Do not promote wall_likelihood from polyline count alone when the layer explicitly names insulation.
rationale.counterfactual: If entities were on a WALL/A-WALL/구조 layer with long parallel double-line pairs, or if LINE wall spines with door gaps appeared, wall_likelihood and role would flip toward 평면 부분도. Presence of DIMENSION or 치수 layers would push toward 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Vertex coordinates and closed/open flags are not given, so geometric wall-likeness cannot be verified. Placement context of the anonymous block insert is unknown from this projection alone.

notes: Same INSUL-only LWPOLYLINE insulation pattern as neighboring *U blocks.

rationale.evidence: 21/21 entities are LWPOLYLINE on INSUL with 5 vertices each in the sample. No structural linework, furniture inserts, or dimension entities are present. Layer token INSUL dominates the judgment away from walls.
rationale.rule: When a definition is 100% INSUL LWPOLYLINE with uniform vertex counts, classify as insulation fill (기타) and keep wall_line_handles empty.
rationale.counterfactual: Wall-core layers or paired parallel long segments would raise wall_likelihood. Furniture block INSERTs would shift role to 가구.
rationale.uncertainty: Without bbox or vertex XY, segment length and alignment to walls cannot be assessed; insert scale/rotation is unknown.

notes: Large INSUL LWPOLYLINE pack (92); insulation hatching mass, not wall def.

rationale.evidence: All 92 entities are LWPOLYLINE on INSUL; sampled handles show repeated 5-vertex polylines. High count suggests a dense insulation hatch region, not a sparse wall centerline set. No non-INSUL layers appear.
rationale.rule: Entity count alone does not make a block a wall partial plan; layer semantics (INSUL) override quantity when entity types are uniform hatch-like polylines.
rationale.counterfactual: If a minority of entities were WALL-layer LINE/LWPOLYLINE forming continuous envelopes, those handles could be listed and wall_likelihood raised. Mixed layers with 벽/벽체 naming would also flip role.
rationale.uncertainty: Only 30 of 92 entities are sampled, so unsampled entities could differ in type though the histogram says LWPOLYLINE=92. Spatial footprint remains unknown.

notes: Small 8-entity INSUL LWPOLYLINE insulation scrap.

rationale.rule: Small INSUL-only polyline anonymous blocks are insulation scraps (기타) with near-zero wall likelihood.
rationale.counterfactual: Renaming/layering onto wall layers or replacing with long orthographic LINE pairs would indicate walls. A single named symbol INSERT would suggest 심볼.
rationale.uncertainty: Cannot tell whether these polylines sit inside wall cavities or are free-standing fills without coordinates or host insert context.

notes: 17 INSUL LWPOLYLINEs; insulation fill cluster.

notes: Flagpole INSERT plus wipeouts and rectangular detail frame LINEs; not walls.

rationale.evidence: Contains INSERT of block X-평면도(기본형)$0$국기계양대 (national flagpole), two WIPEOUTs, and twenty LINEs on layer 0 forming a wide shallow rectangular frame (bbox ~1220 x 126). Composition is a framed detail/symbol assembly, not floor-plan wallwork.
rationale.rule: When a definition is dominated by a named equipment/symbol INSERT plus border LINEs and wipeouts, role is 심볼; border lines are annotation frames, not wall_line_handles.
rationale.counterfactual: If the INSERT were absent and LINEs formed room-scale parallel wall pairs with openings on wall layers, role would shift to 평면 부분도 with selected wall handles. Pure DIMENSION content would indicate 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Inner flagpole geometry lives in the nested block and is not expanded here. Whether the frame is a title strip vs. scaled detail border is inferred from bbox aspect, not proven.
